task_frame_summary: The gated handoff path remains valid, but the frame risks overreading handoff clarity as operational readiness.
assumed_goal: Keep the case inside a bounded handoff frame without letting future-oriented language imply runtime progression.
explicit_constraints: No runtime or operator action follows from the handoff artifact.
Conflict visibility stays part of the framing.
latent_frame_risks: A polished handoff can be mistaken for implied dispatch readiness.
Forward-oriented language can hide how bounded the artifact still is.
missing_but_decisive_questions: Where would a reader mistake bounded handoff preparation for runtime actionability?
Which phrase would overstate what the handoff artifact authorizes?
frame_risk_signals: handoff language invites premature operational interpretation
user gate language can fade behind artifact polish
